name: @gustavobonze/gemini-plugin-cc
description: Use Gemini from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

scripts.validate: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'fs'; for(const f of ['plugins/gemini/.claude-plugin/plugin.json','plugins/gemini/hooks/hooks.json','.claude-plugin/marketplace.json']){JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));console.log('OK:',f)}"
